title: Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Upgrading of Shelui-Nzega Road Poject) (M/s China Geo-Engineering Corporation) Order, 2002
title_en: Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Upgrading of Shelui-Nzega Road Poject) (M/s China Geo-Engineering Corporation) Order, 2002

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as The Excise Tariff (Exemption) (Up­grading of Shelui-Nzega Road Project) (M/s China Geo-Engineering Cor­poration) Order, 2002 and shall be deemed to have come into operation on the first day of July, 2002.

provisions.title: Exemption
provisions.content: Subject to the conditions specified in paragraph 3 of this Order, the whole of the excise duty payable on the fuel, oil and Lubricants specified in the Schedule imported or purchased prior to clearance through customs by or on behalf of M/s China Geo-Engineering Corporation to be used solely in the implementation of the Upgrading of Shelui-Nzega Road Project is hereby exempted.

provisions.title: Conditions
provisions.content: The exemption granted under this Order shall cease to have effect and the excise duty shall become due and be payable as if this Order had not been made if the said fuel or oil and lubricants are used for other purposes, or are transferred, sold or disposed of in any way to another person not entitled to enjoy similar privileges as are conferred under this Order. Schedule 1. Diesel 7,774,433 Litres 2. Petrol 400,741.2 Litres 3.
